issues.title: No 'Hottest District' summary
issues.description: An executive wants to know 'Which district has the most crime?' at a glance. The maps and list require reading through data.
reproduction_steps: Try to identify the hottest district quickly
issues.expected: A callout showing 'Hottest district: District X with Y crimes'
issues.actual: No summary; maps and list required

summary: Locations page shows maps but lacks executive-level summary.
